prestazioni: Engine: Koenigsegg 4.7L V8 (internally designated 'Kappa' block, derived from the CCR's original 4.7L but reinforced with billet aluminum main caps and upgraded forged internals from the Agera's 'Kappa II' iteration). Upgraded to 10.5:1 compression ratio (from stock 8.6:1) via custom Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (part #MAH-4033) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods (part #CR-6125).

Forced Induction: Twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers (55mm compressor, 33mm turbine) with ceramic ball bearings, upgraded to 2.2 bar (32 psi) boost via Koenigsegg's proprietary 'Boost Control Module' (BCM) with dual-stage wastegate actuation. Custom titanium turbine housings (T4 flange) and Inconel 718 turbine wheels for sustained 1,200°C exhaust gas temps. Intercooling via dual PWR (Performance Wiring & Racing) 12-row air-to-water heat exchangers with 100% ethylene glycol coolant and Bosch Motorsport 12V high-flow pumps.

Drivetrain: Koenigsegg 6-speed sequential transaxle (internally designated 'TranSix') upgraded with OS Giken 2.15:1 final drive ratio (from stock 2.73:1) and carbon-fiber reinforced synchros (Hoerbiger CS-4). Limited-slip differential replaced with Drexler Motorsport 2-way mechanical LSD (part #DREX-9300) with 65% lockup under power. Clutch system upgraded to twin-disc AP Racing CP9460 carbon-carbon setup with 300mm discs and hydraulic actuation via Tilton 7/8" master cylinder.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full 'Ghost' aero package by Koenigsegg's in-house division, featuring a carbon-fiber front splitter with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via cockpit switch, +120kg downforce at 250 km/h) and a rear diffuser with integrated vortex generators (3D-printed titanium, designed via CFD for -8% drag coefficient). Rear wing replaced with a fixed-position 'Shark Fin' design (carbon-fiber, 1.8m span) with adjustable angle of attack (0-15°) via electric actuators (Bosch Rexroth).

Bodywork: Full carbon-fiber body panels (pre-preg autoclave, 120°C cure cycle) with 'Frozen Black' matte finish (PPG Aerospace 9937) and exposed weave on the hood, roof, and rear clamshell. Custom 'Evolution' side skirts with integrated LED turn signals (Osram Oslon Black Flat) and carbon-fiber air curtains (channeling airflow to rear brakes). Front bumper replaced with a 3D-printed titanium mesh grille (laser-sintered, 0.8mm lattice) for improved radiator airflow.

Wheels & Brakes: Front: Dymag CX-R carbon-fiber wheels (19x11", ET25) with titanium hardware and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35 ZR19). Rear: Dymag CX-R (20x13", ET15) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (345/30 ZR20). Braking system upgraded to AP Racing CP9760 6-piston calipers (front) and CP9761 4-piston (rear) with 420mm (front) and 380mm (rear) carbon-ceramic rotors (Brembo CCMR, part #09.9604.11/09.9604.12) and Ferodo DS3000 pads. Brake lines replaced with Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel braided lines (part #GSS-1009).
